name: Knowledge Base
description: Multi-source knowledge search (pgvector + LightRAG) — injects relevant documents and knowledge graph context before each turn via the before_prompt_build hook

enabled.description: Master switch — disables all knowledge injection when false

geminiApiKey.description: Gemini API key used to embed user queries for pgvector search. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

postgresUrl.description: PostgreSQL connection string for the knowledge database (pgvector). Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

collections.description: Collection names to search in the knowledge_vectors table

topK.description: Maximum number of results returned per collection

scoreThreshold.description: Minimum cosine similarity score (0–1) to include a result

maxInjectChars.description: Character budget for pgvector results injected into the prompt

pgvectorEnabled.description: Disable pgvector search while keeping LightRAG. Defaults to true when geminiApiKey is set.

lightragUrl.description: LightRAG server base URL (e.g. http://openclaw-lightrag:9621). Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

lightragApiKey.description: LightRAG API key sent as X-API-Key header. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

lightragQueryMode.description: LightRAG query mode: naive (vector), local (entity), global (community), hybrid (recommended)

lightragMaxChars.description: Character budget for LightRAG context injected into the prompt

lightragEnabled.description: Disable LightRAG search while keeping pgvector. Defaults to true when lightragUrl is set.

enabled.label: Auto-inject knowledge
enabled.help: Automatically search and inject relevant documents before each agent turn

geminiApiKey.label: Gemini API Key
geminiApiKey.help: Required for pgvector search. Use ${GEMINI_API_KEY} for env var substitution.

postgresUrl.label: PostgreSQL URL
postgresUrl.help: Connection string for the knowledge database. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

collections.label: Collections to search
collections.help: Collection names in the knowledge_vectors table (e.g. knowledge_olivier, knowledge_shared)

topK.label: Top-K per collection
topK.help: Maximum number of results returned per collection (default: 5)

scoreThreshold.label: Score threshold
scoreThreshold.help: Minimum cosine similarity 0–1 to include a result (default: 0.3)

pgvectorEnabled.label: Enable pgvector source
pgvectorEnabled.help: Disable pgvector while keeping LightRAG. Defaults to true when geminiApiKey is set.

lightragApiKey.label: LightRAG API Key
lightragApiKey.help: Sent as X-API-Key header. Use ${LIGHTRAG_API_KEY} for env var substitution.

lightragEnabled.label: Enable LightRAG source
lightragEnabled.help: Disable LightRAG while keeping pgvector. Defaults to true when lightragUrl is set.
